Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: NONE, NONE, NONE; MD5, MD5, MD5; SHA1, SHA1, SHA1; SHA224, SHA224, SHA224; SHA256, SHA256, SHA256; SHA384, SHA384, SHA384; SHA512, SHA512, SHA512; BLAKE2B_224, BLAKE2B_224, BLAKE2 B_224; BLAKE2B_256, BLAKE2B_256, BLAKE2 B_256; BLAKE2B_384, BLAKE2B_384, BLAKE2 B_384; BLAKE2B_512, BLAKE2B_512, BLAKE2 B_512; BLAKE2S_128, BLAKE2S_128, BLAKE2 S_128; BLAKE2S_160, BLAKE2S_160, BLAKE2 S_160; BLAKE2S_224, BLAKE2S_224, BLAKE2 S_224; BLAKE2S_256, BLAKE2S_256, BLAKE2 S_256; GOST3411_2012_256, GOST3411_2012_256, GOST3411_2012_256; GOST3411_2012_512, GOST3411_2012_512, GOST3411_2012_512; GOST3411, GOST3411, GOST3411; KECCAK_224, KECCAK_224, KECCAK_224; KECCAK_256, KECCAK_256, KECCAK_256; KECCAK_288, KECCAK_288, KECCAK_288; KECCAK_384, KECCAK_384, KECCAK_384; KECCAK_512, KECCAK_512, KECCAK_512; MD2, MD2, MD2; MD4, MD4, MD4; RIPEMD128, RIPEMD128, RIPEMD128; RIPEMD160, RIPEMD160, RIPEMD160; RIPEMD256, RIPEMD256, RIPEMD256; RIPEMD320, RIPEMD320, RIPEMD320; SHA3-224, SHA3_224, SHA3_224; SHA3-256, SHA3_256, SHA3_256; SHA3-384, SHA3_384, SHA3_384; SHA3-512, SHA3_512, SHA3_512; SHAKE_128, SHAKE_128, SHAKE_128; SHAKE_256, SHAKE_256, SHAKE_256; SM3, SM3, SM3; TIGER, TIGER, TIGER; WHIRLPOOL, WHIRLPOOL, WHIRLPOOL
